sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, value INT);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (1, if(5 > 2, 10, 20));
UPDATE test_table SET value = if(value < 15, 5, 15) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, if(value >= 5, 'High', 'Low') AS value_category FROM test_table;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (2, if(3 < 1, 0, if(3 = 3, 1, 2)));
